name: Codfish Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the cod, egg, pepper, butter, potatoes, salt, and onion juice.
2. Mix until all ingredients are well incorporated and the mixture is smooth.
3. Shape the mixture into small balls using your hands.
4. Heat the oil in a deep fryer or heavy pot to 375°F (190°C).
5. Carefully lower the fish balls into the hot oil using tongs or a slotted spoon.
6. Fry for approximately 1 minute, or until golden brown and cooked through.
7. Remove the fish balls from the oil using a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
8. Serve immediately with lemon slices and cocktail sauce, if desired.
Preparation time: 10 to 15 minutes
Cooking time: Approximately 1 minute
